headline: Assessing Texas Instruments (TXN) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Texas Instruments stock: why recent performance is catching attention Texas Instruments (TXN) has caught investor attention after solid recent returns, with the stock up 6.0% over the past week, about 39% over the past month, and roughly 35% over the past 3 months.
